untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of fundamental catalysts (new product/management/industry change announcement within 12 months) and shares outstanding < 30 million. These are not price/technical indicators and cannot be expressed using the allowed indicator set. The rule also specifies context-dependent direction requiring fundamental analysis, which exceeds technical indicator capabilities. Implemented partial rule using 13-week price high (Donchian upper) and volume confirmation.
translation_notes: Translated '13-week new high' to dc_upper (Donchian Channel upper band approximates recent highs). Volume confirmation uses vol_ratio_20 (volume > 1.0x 20-day average). Exit at close below sma_10 (approximates 10-day moving average). Catalyst announcement recency and share count cannot be modeled with technical indicators alone and require external fundamental data.
